---
title: "About"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ken-osumi
---

<!-- Placeholder — replace with your own bio before sharing the URL. -->

I am Ken Osumi. I work on reading the internal representations of protein
language models (ESMC and its sparse autoencoder features) and turning them
into residue-level, falsifiable mechanistic hypotheses and the experiments
that would test them.

This site is where I think in public: reproductions, methods, and the
occasional wrong guess.
